narrative:
Huron City has 4,927 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.1 percentage points.
